hero.title: Turn fragmented AI capabilities into experts that finish the work
hero.description: State the goal once. Do Worker organizes methods, organizational knowledge, execution tools, and AI capabilities behind one Expert that works across engineering, content, data, and operations.
hero.proof: Shared context · Cross-system execution · Human confirmation · Evidence-backed delivery

console.title: Cross-functional work in progress
console.status: One Expert owns the goal with human confirmation at key decisions
console.goal: Launch a verified multilingual campaign for a new market
console.formula: Research · Knowledge · Content · Data · System action
console.checkpoint: Approve positioning, brand language, and compliance boundaries before publishing.
console.deliverable: Market brief, localized assets, process evidence, and next actions

solutions.title: Enter through a real goal and follow the work to delivery
solutions.description: Choose the outcome you need instead of assembling a crowd of agents. Each entry keeps one Expert and one context while calling the required cross-functional capabilities.

items.title: Cross-border growth
items.description: Connect market research, positioning, content, localization, launch preparation, and performance review around one expansion goal.
items.chain: Research → Positioning → Content → Localization → Launch prep → Review
items.outcome: Market plans, product assets, localized content, and process evidence.
items.action: Create an Expert for this goal

items.title: Course development
items.description: Start from learning outcomes and organize research, curriculum, lessons, labs, assessments, and instructor review.
items.chain: Outcomes → Curriculum → Lessons → Labs → Assessment → Review
items.outcome: Syllabi, lessons, labs, quizzes, and acceptance evidence.
items.action: Create an Expert for this goal

items.title: AI partners
items.description: Work alongside an AI partner that shares context with your team and combines research, documents, data, content, and system actions across departmental boundaries.
items.chain: Set the goal together → Read organizational knowledge → Act across tools → Share progress → Human confirmation → Deliver evidence
items.outcome: Collaborative results, system actions, progress notes, and inspectable evidence.

items.title: Expert marketplace
items.description: Discover reusable Experts and Skills by outcome, then inspect capabilities, permissions, and deliverables before installation.
items.chain: Discover → Inspect → Install → Configure → Run → Govern
items.outcome: Reusable Experts with visible capabilities, permissions, and delivery expectations.

capabilities.title: One Expert can call many professional capabilities
capabilities.description: A single delivery chain can use research, documents, data, code, and media. Maturity labels distinguish platform features, capabilities assembled through Skills or tools, and planned directions.

items.title: Programming and delivery
items.description: Change code, run tests, review work, and deliver a PR or MR in an isolated workspace.

items.title: Research and judgment
items.description: Combine retrieval and analysis into sourced conclusions and briefs.

items.title: Professional documents
items.description: Read, structure, revise, and deliver documents ready for continued use.

items.title: Office production
items.description: Work with spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and repeatable operations.

items.title: Content operations
items.description: Connect research, drafting, editing, localization, review, and launch preparation.

items.title: Scripts and direction
items.description: Organize narrative structure, scripts, shot plans, and production handoffs.

items.title: Image assets
items.description: Generate, edit, inspect, and package visual assets through connected tools.

items.title: Audio assets
items.description: Plan, generate, process, and review voice or music through connected tools.

items.title: Video production
items.description: Coordinate scripts, assets, generation, editing, and quality review.

items.title: Data and system operations
items.description: Query, transform, analyze, and verify structured data with controlled tools.

items.title: Courses and learning
items.description: Connect course design, lessons, labs, assessment, and learning evidence.

items.title: Industry Expert marketplace
items.description: A catalog of industry Experts and business connectors for organizations.

operating.title: One Expert in front. Your organization's capabilities behind it.
operating.description: The Expert keeps one identity, goal, context, and task state. The platform organizes the execution runtime, model, professional methods, organizational knowledge, system tools, and operating rules around it.
operating.formulaTitle: Six capability layers behind an Expert

parts.title: Execution runtime
parts.description: Select the Worker runtime suited to the assignment.

parts.title: Reasoning and generation
parts.description: Choose models by task instead of making model names the user interface.

parts.title: Professional methods
parts.description: Capture domain methods and delivery standards as reusable Skills.

parts.title: Organizational knowledge
parts.description: Connect files, standards, history, and business context.

parts.title: System action
parts.description: Use controlled connections to act in browsers, databases, and business systems.

parts.title: Operating rules
parts.description: Define order, checkpoints, budgets, stop conditions, and evidence.

operating.humanDescription: The Expert can keep working while important decisions, privileged actions, and final delivery remain visible.

humanItems.title: Key confirmation
humanItems.description: Pause high-impact decisions for approval, rejection, or revision.

humanItems.title: Complete delivery
humanItems.description: Return artifacts together with status, evidence, and unresolved risks.

humanItems.title: Reusable practice
humanItems.description: Turn proven methods into versioned Skills, Experts, and workflows.

market.title: Reuse catalog Experts instead of rebuilding an AI team
market.description: The current catalog starts with software-engineering Experts that map to real platform capabilities. Begin with outcomes, permissions, and delivery expectations, then inspect the underlying Worker, Skills, and runtime configuration.

apps.title: Software delivery Expert
apps.description: From requirement breakdown and isolated development to testing, review, and PR or MR delivery.

apps.title: Complex work orchestration Expert
apps.description: Split complex goals into parallel assignments and consolidate one accepted result.

apps.title: Dual-repository sync Expert
apps.description: Synchronize GitLab and GitHub with divergence detection and the correct review path.

market.plannedDescription: Cross-border growth, course development, and AI partners will enter the market only after their Skills, connectors, and delivery chains are verified.

trust.title: One interface does not mean unlimited access
trust.description: An Expert can work across systems while every run remains constrained by infrastructure, isolated workspaces, credential scope, human confirmation, and evidence requirements.

items.title: Controlled execution location
items.description: Run Workers inside infrastructure and network boundaries defined by the organization.

items.title: Isolated workspaces
items.description: Separate each assignment, its files, and execution context.

items.title: Scoped credentials
items.description: Grant only the access required by the Expert and assignment.

items.title: Inspectable evidence
items.description: Retain activity, decisions, artifacts, and delivery status.

trust.runtimesDescription: The platform defines Worker types including Codex CLI, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Aider, and OpenCode. Deployability still depends on runtime catalog and release verification status.

cta.title: Let your first Expert own one complete delivery chain
cta.description: Choose an existing Expert or combine the Workers, Skills, knowledge, and tools your organization trusts into one expert interface.
